form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. At the latest run second last of 11 at this track on March 7 over 1300m, 14 len behind Rapture with 52.5kg at $11.80. The race before that 7th of 11 at this track on February 1 over 1300m, 8 len behind Ubermensch carrying 52.5kg at $21.70. Looks tested again.

form.formComment: Last start favourite; won by a head at this track March 21 over 1400m defeating Dream Dia carrying 51.5kg at $2.70. form.formComment: Comes here off a 42-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 11 at this track on February 28 over 1300m, 6 len behind Best Cheonha with 52kg at $29. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run came from midfield and won by 0.5 len at this track March 7 over 1300m defeating Unju Time with 53kg at $3.10.
